action: Failure-adapter stall-inactivity classification — taxonomy class 12 + 3 decision-tree branches
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c33 ships first (needs phase-watchdog.sh to produce stall-inactivity failedApproaches[] entries). Scope (3 files, ~50 LoC): (1) scripts/failure/failure-classifications.sh +12 LoC add stall-inactivity class — TTL 1d (same as infrastructure-transient), severity medium, retry policy 1× per cycle. (2) scripts/failure/failure-adapter.sh +20 LoC insert decision-tree branches between current steps 5 and 6: 5b tail-streak≥2 same phase → BLOCK-OPERATOR-ACTION; 5c exactly 1 stall-inactivity no other tail → RETRY-WITH-FALLBACK; 5d stall + any infra-systemic → BLOCK. (3) scripts/tests/failure-adapter-stall-test.sh NEW ~30 LoC. Closes the gap where current resume-cycle.sh treats stall-killed cycles same as quota-killed (PROCEED default) when the right behavior is bounded-retry-then-block. Citations: CrewAI max_retry_limit pattern (default 2), Portkey 'retry storm' warning.
